summary: Admin panel Products and Product Categories pages tested successfully. All requested features are working correctly. Products page displays 217 products from /api/catalog/products, Product Categories page displays 9 categories from /api/products. Search, pagination, and CRUD modals are functional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel Products and Product Categories pages are fully functional. Products page at /admin/products uses /api/catalog/products endpoint (217 products). Product Categories page at /admin/product-categories uses /api/products endpoint (9 categories).

products_page.displays_217_products: PASS - Shows 'Manage your product catalog (217 products)'
products_page.table_columns: PASS - Product, Brand, Category, Status, Actions
products_page.search_functionality: PASS - Searching 'Sonos' filters to 9 products correctly
products_page.pagination: PASS - Shows 'Page 1 of 11 (217 products)', Previous/Next buttons work
products_page.add_product_modal: PASS - Opens with required fields (Name, Brand, Category, Sub Category, Image, Description, Specifications, Features, checkboxes)
products_page.edit_product_modal: PASS - Pre-populates with existing data (name: '2-Way OutBack Rock Speaker', brand: 'Russound', category: 'Audio', description, image)

product_categories_page.displays_9_categories: PASS - Shows 'Organize products into categories (9 categories)'
product_categories_page.stats_cards: PASS - 9 Total Categories, 6 Featured, 50 Total Brands Listed

product_categories_page.search_functionality: PASS - Searching 'Audio' filters to 2 categories (Audio Systems, Audio Test)
product_categories_page.add_category_modal: PASS - Opens with required fields (Name, Slug, Icon, Image, Description, Brands, Related Solutions, Specifications, Featured checkbox)
product_categories_page.edit_category_modal: PASS - Pre-populates with existing data (name: 'Accessories', slug: 'accessories', icon, image, description)

admin_login.status: PASS - Successfully logs in with admin/lexa2026
